# SearchFilter

Search input that parses typed queries into structured `FilterObject` arrays. Supports full-text, column-specific, comparison, and regex filter syntax. Uses `parseFilters()` from `@rokkit/data` internally.

## Import

```javascript
import { SearchFilter } from '@rokkit/ui'
```

## Quick Start

```svelte
<script>
  import { SearchFilter } from '@rokkit/ui'
  let filters = $state([])
</script>

<SearchFilter bind:filters placeholder="Search..." />
```

## Filter Syntax

| Input | Meaning |
|-------|---------|
| `apple` | Full-text search across all columns (case-insensitive) |
| `name:alice` | Column `name` contains "alice" (case-insensitive) |
| `age>30` | Column `age` greater than 30 |
| `status!=active` | Column `status` not equal to "active" |
| `name~alice` | Regex match (case-sensitive) |
| `name~*alice` | Regex match (case-insensitive) |

Operators: `:` `=` `!=` `>` `<` `>=` `<=` `~` `~*` `!~` `!~*`

Multiple tokens combine: `status:active age>30 name:alice`

## FilterObject Shape

```typescript
{
  column?: string           // undefined = all columns
  operator: string          // '~*', '>', '!=', etc.
  value: string | number | RegExp
}
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| `filters` | `FilterObject[]` (bindable) | `[]` | Parsed filter array |
| `placeholder` | `string` | `'Search...'` | Input placeholder |
| `debounce` | `number` | `300` | Parse delay in ms |
| `size` | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` | Size variant |
| `onfilter` | `(filters) => void` | — | Called when filters change |
| `class` | `string` | `''` | Additional CSS classes |

## Snippets

- `tag(filter, remove)` — Custom chip rendering for each parsed filter
